domain: Enterprise Command Center / Govt PSU Project Monitoring

rules: Avoid Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serifs.
Overlines for KPIs must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-widest.

grid_system.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6

borders_and_surfaces.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600/20
borders_and_surfaces.tables: border-collapse border border-slate-200, row border-b border-slate-100

components.navigation: Fixed left rail (w-64) with dark theme (bg-slate-900 text-slate-300) for high contrast. Top app bar for global search and breadcrumbs (bg-white border-b border-slate-200).
components.buttons: Square or minimally rounded (rounded-sm). Primary uses brand blue. Secondary uses outline (border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50).
components.badges: Used for statuses (Green/Amber/Red). Use pale background with dark text and border (e.g., bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200).
components.tables: High density. text-sm. Use sticky headers. Hover state on rows (hover:bg-slate-50). Actions (edit/view) aligned right.
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Use solid lines. Avoid 3D or heavy gradients. Stick to brand blue, emerald, amber, red for data series.
components.kanban: For Finance & Billing workflow. Columns represent stages. Cards have tight padding (p-3), sharp borders, and display SLA aging.
components.tabs: Underline style preferred over pills for enterprise look. border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-slate-300 data-[state=active]:border-blue-600.

motion.hover_states: Buttons and links should have transition-colors duration-150. Cards can have a subtle shadow-md lift on hover (-translate-y-px).
motion.page_transitions: None. Keep it snappy and immediate.

icons.usage: Use 16px (w-4 h-4) for buttons/tables, 24px (w-6 h-6) for KPIs. Always pair status colors with icons (CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, XCircle) for accessibility.

image_urls.description: Steel plant silhouette against sky, representing industrial mega-projects. Use with a dark overlay (bg-slate-900/80) on the login page.
Engineering blueprint. Use as a subtle watermark or empty state illustration in the Drawing & Document Approval module.
Abstract white logo, use as a placeholder for the MECON or partner logo. Can be heavily cropped.
Workers inspecting an industrial space. Use this as a simulated CCTV live feed thumbnail on the dashboard.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Never rely solely on color for meaning (e.g., an Amber hindrance badge must have text saying 'Severity: High' or a warning icon).
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, tabs, table rows, form inputs) MUST have a descriptive data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='approve-dpr-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Write components in .js or .jsx, not .tsx. Prop types or standard JS is required.
Use pure Tailwind CSS for structural grid layouts (avoid overusing generic Shadcn Card/Section wrappers for complex grids).
Build the dashboard using a CSS grid (grid-cols-12). Follow the layout rules in this JSON strictly.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, dropdowns, and tabs, but customize the classes to use sharp borders (rounded-sm) and the defined slate/blue color palette.
Avoid gradients entirely. Use flat colors with 1px borders.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all iconography.
For typography, import Chivo and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts in index.css or equivalent.
Do not use purple or teal. Stick to Slate, Blue, Emerald, Amber, and Red.
Ensure every clickable element has a unique 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
